records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.303 - Abd al-Rahim al-Qasir narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that He said: "Whoever trims their nails and mustache every Jumu’ah and says while doing so:
Bismillāhi wa billāhi wa ‘alā sunnati Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad ṣalawātu Allāhi ‘alayhim
In the name of Allah (swt), and by Allah (swt), and upon the Sunnah of Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, may the blessings of Allah (swt) be upon them,'
That no nail or hair clipping will fall except that Allah (swt), the Mighty and Glorious, will record it as freeing a soul, and such a person will not become ill except for the illness that causes their death."
records.arabicText: 303 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحِيمِ اَلْقَصِيرُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ - «مَنْ أَخَذَ مِنْ أَظْفَارِهِ وَ شَارِبِهِ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ وَقَالَ حِينَ يَأْخُذُهُ: بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ وَ بِاللَّهِ وَ عَلَى سُنَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَوَاتُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمْ لَمْ تَسْقُطْ مِنْهُ قُلاَمَةٌ وَ لاَ جُزَازَةٌ إِلاَّ كَتَبَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ بِهَا عِتْقَ نَسَمَةٍ وَ لَمْ يَمْرَضْ إِلاَّ مَرَضَهُ اَلَّذِي يَمُوتُ فِيهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.303 - Abd al-Rahim al-Qasir narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that He said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Whoever trims their nails and mustache every Jumu’ah and says while doing so:
Bismillāhi wa billāhi wa ‘alā sunnati Muḥammad wa āli Muḥammad ṣalawātu Allāhi ‘alayhim
In the name of Allah (swt), and by Allah (swt), and upon the Sunnah of Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, may the blessings of Allah (swt) be upon them,'
That no nail or hair clipping will fall except that Allah (swt), the Mighty and Glorious, will record it as freeing a soul, and such a person will not become ill except for the illness that causes their death."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.304 - It is also reported in another narration:
"Whoever trims their nails on Jumu’ah should start with the little finger of the left hand and finish with the little finger of the right hand."
records.arabicText: 304 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «أَنَّهُ مَنْ يُقَلِّمْ أَظَافِيرَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ ' يَبْدَأْ بِخِنْصِرِهِ مِنَ اَلْيَدِ اَلْيُسْرَى وَ يَخْتِمْ بِخِنْصِرِهِ مِنَ اَلْيَدِ اَلْيُمْنَى.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.304 - It is also reported in another narration:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever trims their nails on Jumu’ah should start with the little finger of the left hand and finish with the little finger of the right hand."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.305 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Trimming the mustache from one Jumu’ah to the next (Jumu’ah) is protection from leprosy."
records.arabicText: 305 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَخْذُ اَلشَّارِبِ مِنَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ إِلَى اَلْجُمُعَةِ أَمَانٌ مِنَ اَلْجُذَامِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.305 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Trimming the mustache from one Jumu’ah to the next (Jumu’ah) is protection from leprosy."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.306 - Al-Hussain ibn Abi al-'Ala asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
'What is the reward for someone who trims their moustache and cuts their nails every Jumu’ah?'
Imam (as) replied: 'They will remain purified until the next Jumu’ah.'
records.arabicText: 306 - وَقَالَ اَلْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ أَبِي اَلْعَلاَءِ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: مَا ثَوَابُ مَنْ أَخَذَ مِنْ شَارِبِهِ وَ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ فِي كُلِّ جُمُعَةٍ قَالَ «لاَ يَزَالُ مُطَهَّراً إِلَى اَلْجُمُعَةِ اَلْأُخْرَى.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.306 - Al-Hussain ibn Abi al-'Ala asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
'What is the reward for someone who trims their moustache and cuts their nails every Jumu’ah?'
Imam (as) replied:
records.thaqalaynMatn: 'They will remain purified until the next Jumu’ah.'

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.307 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"None of you should allow their moustache grow long, for Shaytan uses it as a shield to conceal himself”.
records.arabicText: 307 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ يُطَوِّلَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ شَارِبَهُ فَإِنَّ اَلشَّيْطَانَ يَتَّخِذُهُ مِجَنّاً يَسْتَتِرُ بِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.307 -
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"None of you should allow their moustache grow long, for Shaytan uses it as a shield to conceal himself”.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.308 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Jumu’ah will not have disheveled fingertips."
records.arabicText: 308 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ ' لَمْ تَشْعَثْ أَنَامِلُهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.308 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever trims their nails on Jumu’ah will not have disheveled fingertips."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.309 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Thursday but leaves one nail to trim on Jumu’ah, Allah (swt) will remove poverty from them."
records.arabicText: 309 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ قَصَّ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ وَ تَرَكَ وَاحِداً لِيَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ نَفَى اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ اَلْفَقْرَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.309 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever trims their nails on Thursday but leaves one nail to trim on Jumu’ah, Allah (swt) will remove poverty from them."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.310 - Abdullah ibn Abi Ya'fur said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"May I be your ransom. It is said that no act brings down sustenance like ta'qeeb (supplications and prayers) between the dawn and sunrise."
Imam (as) replied: "Indeed, but I will tell you something even better than that: trimming the mustache and cutting the nails on Jumu’ah."
records.arabicText: 310 - وَقَالَ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي يَعْفُورٍ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ يُقَالُ مَا اُسْتُنْزِلَ اَلرِّزْقُ بِشَيْءٍ مِثْلِ اَلتَّعْقِيبِ فِيمَا بَيْنَ طُلُوعِ اَلْفَجْرِ إِلَى طُلُوعِ اَلشَّمْسِ فَقَالَ «أَجَلْ وَ لَكِنْ أُخْبِرُكَ بِخَيْرٍ مِنْ ذَلِكَ أَخْذِ اَلشَّارِبِ وَ تَقْلِيمِ اَلْأَظْفَارِ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.310 - Abdullah ibn Abi Ya'fur said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"May I be your ransom. It is said that no act brings down sustenance like ta'qeeb (supplications and prayers) between the dawn and sunrise."
Imam (as) replied:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Indeed, but I will tell you something even better than that: trimming the mustache and cutting the nails on Jumu’ah."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.311 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Whoever trims their nails every Thursday, their child will not suffer from eye ailments”.
records.arabicText: 311 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَخَذَ مِنْ أَظْفَارِهِ كُلَّ يَوْمِ خَمِيسٍ ' لَمْ يَرْمَدْ وَلَدُهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.311 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever trims their nails every Thursday, their child will not suffer from eye ailments”.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.312 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Saturday and Thursday and trims their mustache will be protected from toothache and eye pain."
records.arabicText: 312 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلسَّبْتِ وَ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ وَ أَخَذَ مِنْ شَارِبِهِ عُوفِيَ مِنْ وَجَعِ اَلضِّرْسِ وَ وَجَعِ اَلْعَيْنِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.312 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever trims their nails on Saturday and Thursday and trims their mustache will be protected from toothache and eye pain."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.313 - Musa ibn Bakr said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"Our companions say that trimming the mustache and nails is only on Jumu’ah."
Imam (as) replied: "Glory be to Allah (swt)! Trim them if you wish on Jumu’ah, or if you wish, on any other day."
records.arabicText: 313 - وَقَالَ مُوسَى بْنُ بَكْرٍ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: إِنَّ أَصْحَابَنَا يَقُولُونَ إِنَّمَا أَخْذُ اَلشَّارِبِ وَ اَلْأَظْفَارِ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ «سُبْحَانَ اَللَّهِ خُذْهَا إِنْ شِئْتَ فِي يَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ وَ إِنْ شِئْتَ فِي سَائِرِ اَلْأَيَّامِ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.314 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: " Trim it when it grows long."
records.arabicText: 314 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «قُصَّهَا إِذَا طَالَتْ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.314 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "
records.thaqalaynMatn: Trim it when it grows long."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.315 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
For men: ‘trim your nails’, and for women: ‘let your nails grow a bit, for it is (source of) beauty for you.’
records.arabicText: 315 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: لِلرِّجَالِ «قُصُّوا أَظَافِيرَكُمْ» وَ لِلنِّسَاءِ «اُتْرُكْنَ مِنْ أَظْفَارِكُنَّ فَإِنَّهُ أَزْيَنُ لَكُنَّ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.315 -
records.thaqalaynMatn:
The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
For men: ‘trim your nails’, and for women: ‘let your nails grow a bit, for it is (source of) beauty for you.’

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.316 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "A man should bury his nails and hair when he trims them, and this is a Sunnah."
records.arabicText: 316 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «يَدْفِنُ اَلرَّجُلُ أَظَافِيرَهُ وَ شَعْرَهُ إِذَا أَخَذَ مِنْهَا وَ هِيَ سُنَّةٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.316 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A man should bury his nails and hair when he trims them, and this is a Sunnah."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.318 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) was asked about the saying of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Glorious:
'Take your adornment at every place of worship.' (Surah Al-A’raf 7:31).
Imam (as) said: "Part of that includes combing one's hair before every prayer”.
records.arabicText: 318 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ» قَالَ «مِنْ ذَلِكَ اَلتَّمَشُّطُ عِنْدَ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.317 - And it is narrated: "Among the Sunnah (traditions) is the burial of hair, nails, and blood."
records.arabicText: 317 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مِنَ اَلسُّنَّةِ دَفْنَ اَلشَّعْرِ وَ اَلظُّفُرِ وَ اَلدَّمِ.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.319 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Combing the hair removes ailments, and combing the beard strengthens the teeth."
records.arabicText: 319 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَشْطُ اَلرَّأْسِ يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَبَاءِ وَ مَشْطُ اَللِّحْيَةِ يَشُدُّ اَلْأَضْرَاسَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.319 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Combing the hair removes ailments, and combing the beard strengthens the teeth."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.320 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"When you comb your beard and head, pass the comb over your chest as well, for it removes worry and lethargy”.
records.arabicText: 320 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا سَرَّحْتَ لِحْيَتَكَ وَ رَأْسَكَ فَأَمِرَّ اَلْمُشْطَ عَلَى صَدْرِكَ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْهَمِّ وَ اَلْوَنَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.320 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "When you comb your beard and head, pass the comb over your chest as well, for it removes worry and lethargy”.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.321 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever combs their beard seventy times and counts it one by one will not be approached by Shaytan (Satan) for forty days."
records.arabicText: 321 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ سَرَّحَ لِحْيَتَهُ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً وَ عَدَّهَا مَرَّةً مَرَّةً لَمْ يَقْرَبْهُ اَلشَّيْطَانُ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْماً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.321 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever combs their beard seventy times and counts it one by one will not be approached by Shaytan (Satan) for forty days."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.322 - Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"Comb your hair with combs made of ivory, for it removes ailments."
records.arabicText: 322 - وَقَالَ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَمَشَّطُوا بِالْعَاجِ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَبَاءِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.322 - Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Comb your hair with combs made of ivory, for it removes ailments."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.323 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Combing the hair removes ailments," referring specifically to fever.
In a narration by Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah al-Barqi, it is stated: 'It removes fatigue,' meaning weakness.
Allah (swt), the Exalted, said:
'And do not slacken in My remembrance,' (Surah Taha 20:42) meaning do not become weak.
records.arabicText:
323 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْمَشْطُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَبَاءِ. وهو الحمى.
وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ اَلْبَرْقِيِّ: «يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَنَا. وَ هُوَ اَلضَّعْفُ قَالَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «وَ لاٰ تَنِيٰا فِي ذِكْرِي» أَيْ لاَ تَضْعُفَا.

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.324 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"There are three things which, if a person understands them, they will not abandon: trimming the hair, shortening the garment, and marrying bondwomen."
records.arabicText: 324 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «ثَلاَثٌ مَنْ عَرَفَهُنَّ لَمْ يَدَعْهُنَّ جَزُّ اَلشَّعْرِ وَ تَشْمِيرُ اَلثَّوْبِ وَ نِكَاحُ اَلْإِمَاءِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.324 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There are three things which, if a person understands them, they will not abandon: trimming the hair, shortening the garment, and marrying bondwomen."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.325 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said to some of his companions:
"Cut your hair short to reduce its dirt, pests, and grime; it will strengthen your neck, improve your eyesight, and provide relief for your body."
records.arabicText: 325 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ لِبَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ: «اِسْتَأْصِلْ شَعْرَكَ يَقِلُّ دَرَنُهُ وَ دَوَابُّهُ وَ وَسَخُهُ وَ تَغْلُظُ رَقَبَتُكَ وَ يَجْلُو بَصَرَكَ وَ يَسْتَرِيحُ بَدَنُكَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.325 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said to some of his companions:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Cut your hair short to reduce its dirt, pests, and grime; it will strengthen your neck, improve your eyesight, and provide relief for your body."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.326 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Whoever grows their hair should take good care of it or cut it short."
records.arabicText: 326 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنِ اِتَّخَذَ شَعْراً فَلْيُحْسِنْ وِلاَيَتَهُ أَوْ لِيَجُزَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.326 -
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Whoever grows their hair should take good care of it or cut it short."

records.chapter: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.327 - He (as) said: "Beautiful hair is part of Allah’s (swt) provision, so honor it."
records.arabicText: 327 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلشَّعْرُ اَلْحَسَنُ مِنْ كِسْوَةِ اَللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَأَكْرِمُوهُ.
